Name: PvZ2_Prerelease_Optimized_2

Updates.en: Optimized character culculations. The game will perform better in some devices.
Updates.zh: 优化了角色计算，游戏在某些设备上将更好运行。

Updates.en: Added "Fix Player" button in Player Selector Window. One can fix player properties which are lack of certain loots.
Updates.zh: 在玩家选择窗口加入“修复存档”功能，用于修复战利品缺失的存档。

NewFeatures: 优化了角色计算，游戏在某些设备上将更好运行。
在存档界面加入“修复存档”功能，用于修复战利品缺失的存档。
EnNewFeatures: Optimized character culculations. The game will perform better in some devices.
Added "Fix Player" button in Player Selector Window. One can fix player properties which are lack of certain loots.
